hiddenMode.title: Hidden mode of main panel widgets
hiddenMode.description: The method for hiding widgets in the main dock panel. Using `scale` will increase performance on Firefox but don't use it with Chrome, Chromium or Edge. Similar performance gains are seen with `contentVisibility` which is only available in Chromium-based browsers.

startMode.title: Start mode: ``, `single` or `multiple`
startMode.description: The mode under which JupyterLab should start. If empty, the mode will be imposed by the URL

layout.title: Customize shell widget positioning

dockPanelPadding.title: Dock panel padding
dockPanelPadding.description: Whether to show padding around the main dock panel area. Disable for a more compact layout.

activityBarPosition.title: Activity bar position
activityBarPosition.description: Position of the side activity bars. `side` keeps each activity bar on the natural side of its area. `top` or `bottom` moves both activity bars to the top or bottom of their respective area, displaying the tabs horizontally.

optimizeResize.title: Optimize panel resize
optimizeResize.description: Freeze panel dimensions during handle drag to improve resize performance when panels contain heavy DOM content.

zoomOnWheel.title: Enable Ctrl+ Scroll Zoom
zoomOnWheel.description: Zoom the widget under the mouse when using Ctrl+ mouse wheel.
